text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan has a number of victories under her
belt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I get called to meet her on the rooftop
for "an earnest talk."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hey, sorry for making you wait so long.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But I've finally made my decision!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
There have been times when I felt worthless and
hated myself, times I wanted to give up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But after overcoming so many hardships and
making it this far, I finally have confidence in
myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: So, you could say that I've finally qualified...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: For a trip to the hot springs!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wha... Did you forget? The raffle we won at the
beginning of the year...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the ticket for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Uh, Trainer... Could you hold onto this ticket for
me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! It's only until I gain enough confidence to
feel comfortable taking time off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I remember now. But the way she was bringing it
up made it sound like something of dire
importance. I didn't realize she was talking about
the hot springs.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I've also decided who I wanna go with. I thought
about inviting McQueen, Ines, and others...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But if I want to fondly reminisce about the
Twinkle Series, I can't think of anyone better
suited.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: So, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Will you please come to the hot springs with me?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, wasn't there an old romance movie with a
title like that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh no, I don't mean it like that! Just take me on a regular trip to the hot springs, a regular trip!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure why she's putting so much emphasis
on "regular," but I decide to take her up on the
offer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... I think I'm gonna cry...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I wanna soak this all in and enjoy it, just relax and
take things slowly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It really feels like I deserve a little fun, since I've
been workin' so hard.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad I held off on coming here until now. It
really feels like a proper reward for myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The wait has given extra meaning to everything.
This must be particularly emotional for her.
choice_data_list:
You've still got plenty more time to enjoy
yourself.

You've still got plenty more time to enjoy
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm gonna have as much fun as I can on this
vacation!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan pays a visit to my room, where we end up
talking about all sorts of things. And then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hey, can I talk to you about something strange?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, when I say strange, I don't mean something
inappropriate or anything like that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
When I was getting into the hot spring, I took a
good look at my body and realized something...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I fear she might be talking about something
inappropriate, but I decide to continue listening.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: It's changed quite a bit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
When I was only doing weightlifting and
forgetting my insecurities, I was hella swole. My
muscles were my pride.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But now... How do I put it nicely? My muscles
look a bit deflated, like they aren't as defined as
before. They're missing that shredded look.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm slimmer now, probably because I've been
running so much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That and the dancing. Maybe it's also because
I've become more conscious about dancing in
front of people.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
With all those changes in my life, my body's
changed too.
choice_data_list: So you had more muscles compared to now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... But no matter how ripped I got, I still felt
uneasy. Those stronger muscles couldn't protect
my heart.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But now, it's the opposite. The strength of my
heart shines out through my body.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It feels like... my body is finally a reflection of
who I really am.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I wanna run, and I wanna dance. Those feelings
became like my muscles, I think.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, any body type is fine. I'm sure everyone
has their own preferences when it comes to that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I actually like my how my body looks now! I
like myself!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So yeah... that's what I thought when getting in
the hot spring.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're here to have fun, so I'm surprised she has
stuff like this on her mind. But I can't say it's
unlike her to do that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Um, so what do you make of all that? If you have
any thoughts, I'd like to hear them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Earnest...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
W-well, yeah. I guess it was... That's just how I am
when I think about myself, you know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Geez, I can't help myself! It's not like I can just go
and change my whole personality!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You know I'm like that! Gosh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, it's just who I am—a stubborn person who
thinks about that kind of stuff, even on vacation!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan puffs out her cheeks and pouts—a
rare sight.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm upset now! Just remember, you're the one who
chose me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I hope our relationship together lasts
forever!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ack, that makes it sound like we're newlyweds or
something...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Argh, but whatever! I'm fine with being earnest!
So get ready to put up with it for a long time,
'cause I'm always gonna be honest!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan has a strange way of getting upset. She's
looking straight at me, but her eyes are quivering.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Do you get that? You have to be earnest too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Well, then... Good to hear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Mejiro Ryan and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
